physics_paths.description: Structural loads from launch vibration and solar pressure are transferred to the deployment rails and internal standoffs.
Electrical signals flow through the PC/104 stack and connectors to the avionics boards.
Thermal management through passive cooling from the exterior to the interior of the CubeSat.
Deployer rails extend and retract to deploy or stow the CubeSat from the launch vehicle.
Service access for board replacement and maintenance through removable panel.
